name: AA Mission Acquisition Corp. II
business: AA Mission Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, formed to effect a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has generated no operating revenues to date. It intends to focus on the food and beverage industry.

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus on industries that complement our management team’s and board of director’s background and network, and to capitalize on the ability of our management team and board of directors to identify and acquire a business, focusing on the food and beverage industry.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association, we will have until 18 months (or up to 24 months with both extensions) from the closing of our IPO, or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to complete an initial business combination.
